overview: Good morning everyone. Let's start the weekly product development meeting. First, we need to discuss the API launch timeline. The backend API is almost ready. I only need two more days to finish the authentication module. From the frontend side, the dashboard UI is finished but I need the final API endpoints. Should we target the API launch next Wednesday? Yes, that timeline works.
decisions: Great. Decision: We will launch the API next Wednesday.
Good morning everyone. Let's start the weekly product development meeting.
Decision: We will conduct an internal product demo on Monday afternoon.

action_items.task: Great. Decision: We will launch the API next Wednesday.
Marketing will also need time to prepare announcement posts and an email campaign.
How long will you need?
Action Item: David will prepare marketing materials before Tuesday.
The user profile page needs small UI improvements. I will complete that by tomorrow evening.
I will optimize the database queries after finishing the authentication module.
Decision: We will conduct an internal product demo on Monday afternoon.
I will prepare a short QA report before the demo.
